name: Jilin Yatai (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin Yatai (Group) Co., Ltd. operates in building materials, real estate, pharmaceutical, finance, coal, and trade and business industries in China. The company mines for limestone and gravel aggregates; and processes, produces, and sells clinker, cement, premixed concrete, and other building materials. It also produces pharmaceutical health products and medicines, and medical equipment; and provides primary land consolidation, housing development, building construction, decoration, environmental engineering, property management, and heating services. In addition, the company offers financial investment services; provides banking services through 392 branches in Jilin province; and operates shopping malls, department stores, and hotels. Further, it engages in exploitation, production, and sale of coal. Jilin Yatai (Group) Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Changchun, China.
